content.full_text:
October 16, 1981

Donna Donegan
Hall of Justice
401 Marshall Street, Room B
Redwood City, CA 94063

Dear Ms. Donegan:

Thank you for your recent telephone call requesting advice from this office. The facts, as you presented them to me, involved the receipt, by the county clerk of two tickets to a political fundraiser held for an assemblyperson. Your question concerned the reporting requirements, as to such tickets.

As we discussed on the telephone, on March 7, 1978, the Fair Political Practices Commission adopted a policy stating that tickets to political fundraisers, need not be reported.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me at (916) 322-5901.

Very truly yours,

Janis L. Shank
Counsel
Legal Division
